title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #13, Kozuki Alliance, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Straw hat!! How are you still breathing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter what you do, I'm not gonna die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the man who'll be King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the man who will be Shogun of Vano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WORORO!! You're the brat?! how unexpected!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Head to Head, "A Clash of Dragons!!
